scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n 'FRONTEND,API,ENGINE,DB,SOCKETS' -c 'cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold' 'npm run dev --workspace=frontend' 'npm run dev --workspace=api' 'npm run dev --workspace=engine' 'npm run dev --workspace=db' 'npm run dev --workspace=sockets'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n 'FRONTEND,API,ENGINE,DB,SOCKETS,MARKETMAKER' -c 'cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold,green.bold' 'npm run dev --workspace=frontend' 'npm run dev --workspace=api' 'npm run dev --workspace=engine' 'npm run dev --workspace=db' 'npm run dev --workspace=sockets' 'npm run dev --workspace=marketmaker'
